title: Qurbani
description: Qurbani, an obligation on able Muslim believers to gain the satisfaction of Allah, is also a right of the needy. However, over time, this sacred festival has become about buying new refrigerators and indulging in meat (Astaghfirullah). In this era of extreme inflation, millions of families have lost the ability to purchase sacrificial animals. On this blessed day, we hope no father bleeds in his heart due to the innocent questions of a child in any middle-class or underprivileged household. This is why we have taken this small initiative. You can join us in this effort too. Join us in building a hunger-free Bangladesh. Your single donation will bring smiles to thousands of needy families.
